senses.definition: to create a visual representation using various mediums such as pencils, pens, or paints on a surface like paper or canvas

examples.x: She decided to do a drawing of her favorite scenery to capture its beauty.
He wanted to do a drawing of his family to celebrate their bond.
The artist was focused on doing a drawing that expressed her emotions.
The art therapist suggested doing a drawing to help her client express their emotions.
The illustrator was committed to doing a drawing that was both accurate and visually appealing.

senses.definition: to engage in physical activity, typically for the purpose of improving one's fitness, health, or overall well-being

examples.x: I make it a point to do exercise at least three times a week to stay fit and healthy.
After work, she enjoys doing exercise by going for a run in the park.
He does exercise in the mornings to boost his energy and start the day right.

senses.definition: to perform a series of physical movements and exercises that require strength, flexibility, and coordination

examples.x: She has been doing gymnastics since she was a child.
Doing gymnastics requires rigorous training and discipline.
He did gymnastics at the national level and won several medals.
Doing gymnastics is not only physically challenging but also artistic and graceful.
She did gymnastics at the Olympics, representing her country.

senses.definition: to style, groom, or arrange one's hair

examples.x: She took her time to do her hair for the special occasion.
Let's do your hair in an elegant updo for the wedding.
He did his hair with a casual, messy look for a laid-back vibe.

senses.definition: to wash, dry, and fold clothing and other textiles, typically as a household chore or as part of regular cleaning

examples.x: She has to do laundry every weekend to keep her clothes clean.
Doing laundry is an important part of maintaining a tidy home.
I like to do laundry early in the morning when it's less crowded at the laundromat.
he taught her children how to do laundry so they could become more self-sufficient.

senses.definition: to apply cosmetics and beauty products to enhance one's appearance

examples.x: I like to do my makeup differently for special occasions, experimenting with various looks.
It's important to do your makeup in natural light to achieve the best results.

senses.definition: to paint or decorate one's fingernails or toenails

examples.x: She did her nails with a vibrant shade of red for the party.
Some people choose to do their nails with intricate nail art for special occasions.
I like to do my nails at home, experimenting with different nail polish colors and designs.

senses.definition: to purchase goods or products, typically while visiting stores or shopping destinations

examples.x: She enjoys doing shopping for clothing and accessories on the weekends.
Doing shopping online has become increasingly popular due to its convenience.

senses.definition: to play or participate in physical activities and games that require movement and skill

examples.x: He likes to do sports like basketball and tennis in his free time.
Doing sports is a great way to stay fit and active.
She did sports during her high school years, including track and field.
Doing sports can be both recreational and a competitive endeavor.
She's very active and loves to do sports like soccer, tennis, and swimming.

senses.definition: to complete various routine or household tasks and responsibilities, typically related to cleaning, tidying, and maintaining a home

examples.x: Let's do the chores together to finish them faster.
Doing chores is a shared responsibility among family members.
He did the chores in preparation for the upcoming family gathering.
Doing chores regularly is essential for maintaining a clean and organized living space.
I like to play music while I do the chores; it makes the tasks more enjoyable.

senses.definition: to tidy up and make a place clean and neat

examples.x: Doing the cleaning is an important part of home maintenance.
Let's do the cleaning before our guests arrive to ensure a neat environment.
He did the cleaning in the office to create a pleasant workspace.
Doing the cleaning regularly prevents clutter and maintains hygiene.
I'll do the cleaning of the garage this weekend.

senses.definition: to prepare and make meals or dishes

examples.x: She enjoys doing the cooking for family gatherings.
Doing the cooking requires culinary skills and creativity.
Let's do the cooking for the dinner party tonight.
He did the cooking for his friends when they came over.
Doing the cooking often involves planning, chopping, and seasoning.

senses.definition: to complete a word game in which one fills in a grid with words or phrases based on given clues

examples.x: Let's do a crossword together and see who finishes first.
She did a crossword in the newspaper during her lunch break.

senses.definition: to wash cups, plates, bowls, etc. particularly after having a meal

examples.x: They take turns doing the dishes after family dinners.
Doing the dishes is a common household chore.
Let's do the dishes together to finish more quickly.
She did the dishes promptly to keep the kitchen organized.
Doing the dishes is essential for maintaining kitchen hygiene.

senses.definition: to clean and maintain a home, including tasks like cleaning, cooking, and laundry

examples.x: She dedicates a portion of her day to do housework.
Doing housework is essential for maintaining a tidy and organized home.
Doing housework is a daily routine for many people to create a comfortable living environment.

senses.definition: to press and remove wrinkles from clothes and fabric using an iron

examples.x: Doing the ironing is a common household chore to maintain neat clothing.
She set aside time every week to do the ironing.
Let's do the ironing for these dress shirts before the meeting.
He did the ironing of his suits to look sharp for the interview.
Doing the ironing properly ensures clothes look well-groomed and professional.

senses.definition: to visit and explore various tourist attractions, landmarks, or places of interest in a particular location

examples.x: They spent the day doing the sights in the city.
Doing the sights in a new place is an exciting way to discover culture.
Let's do the sights, starting with the historic district.
She did the sights and captured stunning photographs.
Doing the sights is an essential part of any vacation or travel experience.
